scripts.build: npm run bundle && node --experimental-sea-config sea-config.json && npx postject dist/fh6-telemetry.exe NODE_SEA_BLOB dist/sea-prep.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2
scripts.build-win: npm run bundle && node --experimental-sea-config sea-config.json && npx postject dist/fh6-telemetry.exe NODE_SEA_BLOB dist/sea-prep.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2
